name_en: head and neck squamous cell carcinoma

drugs.efficacy_snippet: 14.6 Head and Neck Cancer Induction Chemotherapy Followed by Radiotherapy (TAX323) The safety and efficacy of docetaxel injection in the induction treatment of patients with squamous cell carcinoma of the head and neck (SCCHN) was evaluated in a multicenter, open-label, randomized trial (TAX323).
